---
title: "compile_session_traces.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\compile_session_traces.py"
loc: 60
complexity: 13
logic_score: 1.82
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 1.44
---

## Intent
The `compile_session_traces.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on compile_traces. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via compile_traces. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [glob](file://glob)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)

### Exports
- `compile_traces`
